Author: ddx-checkpoint <checkpoint@ddx.local>
Date:   Sat May 16 02:15:06 2026 -0400

    checks: delete unused axon subscription scaffold [ddx-8bc79046]
    
    Resolves the residual deadcode RTA cluster for
    cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription.go. The Axon GraphQL Client is not
    wired into production — only tests touched the SubscribeChangeEvents /
    DualTransport / WebSocketSubscriptionTransport surface. Per the bead's
    DELETE branch, drop subscription.go, the two subscription-only tests,
    and the lifecycle assertions in client_test.go.
    
    Per-symbol decisions captured in .ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md.

12	type noopTransport struct{}
13	
14	func (noopTransport) Query(context.Context, string, map[string]any, any) error {
15		return nil
16	}
17	
18	func TestAxonClient_SchemaBindingsCompile(t *testing.T) {
19		t.Parallel()
20	
21		client := NewClient(noopTransport{})
22		_, err := client.GetBead(context.Background(), "ddx-00000001")
23		require.NoError(t, err)
24	
25		local := bead.Bead{
26			ID:          "ddx-00000001",
27			Title:       "scaffold",
28			Status:      bead.StatusOpen,
29			Priority:    bead.DefaultPriority,
30			IssueType:   bead.DefaultType,
31			Owner:       "owner",
32			CreatedAt:   time.Unix(10, 0).UTC(),
33			CreatedBy:   "creator",
34			UpdatedAt:   time.Unix(20, 0).UTC(),
35			Labels:      []string{"kind:feature"},
36			Parent:      "ddx-00000002",
37			Description: "local model",
38			Acceptance:  "AC",
39			Notes:       "notes",
40			Dependencies: []bead.Dependency{{
41				IssueID:     "ddx-00000001",
42				DependsOnID: "ddx-00000002",
43				Type:        "blocks",
44				CreatedAt:   "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z",
45				CreatedBy:   "creator",
46				Metadata:    "meta",
47			}},
48			Extra: map[string]any{"source": "test"},
49		}
50	
51		remote := BeadFromLocal(local)
52		require.Equal(t, local.ID, remote.ID)
53		require.Equal(t, local.Title, remote.Title)
54		require.Equal(t, local.Status, remote.Status)
55		require.Equal(t, local.Priority, remote.Priority)
56		require.Equal(t, local.IssueType, remote.IssueType)
57		require.Equal(t, local.Owner, remote.Owner)
58		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedAt, remote.CreatedAt)
59		require.Equal(t, local.CreatedBy, remote.CreatedBy)
60		require.Equal(t, local.UpdatedAt, remote.UpdatedAt)
61		require.Equal(t, local.Labels, remote.Labels)
62		require.Equal(t, local.Parent, remote.Parent)
63		require.Equal(t, local.Description, remote.Description)
64		require.Equal(t, local.Acceptance, remote.Acceptance)
65		require.Equal(t, local.Notes, remote.Notes)
66		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, remote.Extra)
67		require.Len(t, remote.Dependencies, 1)
68		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].IssueID, remote.Dependencies[0].IssueID)
69		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID, remote.Dependencies[0].DependsOnID)
70		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Type, remote.Dependencies[0].Type)
71		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedAt)
72		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy, remote.Dependencies[0].CreatedBy)
73		require.Equal(t, local.Dependencies[0].Metadata, remote.Dependencies[0].Metadata)
74	
75		back := remote.ToLocal()
76		require.Equal(t, local, back)
77	
78		input := BeadInputFromLocal(local)
79		require.Equal(t, local.ID, input.ID)

81		require.Equal(t, local.Extra, input.Extra)

input.content:
# Decisions — ddx-8bc79046

Residual deadcode RTA cluster: `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription.go`.

The Axon GraphQL `Client` (in `generated.go`) is not imported by any
production code path (`rg '"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/bead/axon"'`
returns no hits). The subscription scaffold in `subscription.go` was reachable
only from `subscription_test.go`, `subscription_smoke_test.go`, and a small
lifecycle-event block inside `client_test.go`. There is no production
consumer to wire it into, so per the bead's DELETE branch we drop the
subscription scaffold and the tests that exercise it.

| # | Symbol | File:Line | Decision |
|---|--------|-----------|----------|
| 1 | `ChangeEventFromLifecycle` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:33` | DELETE |
| 2 | `ChangeEvent.ToLifecycleEvent` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:47` | DELETE |
| 3 | `DualTransport.Query` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:73` | DELETE |
| 4 | `DualTransport.Subscribe` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:81` | DELETE |
| 5 | `NewWebSocketSubscriptionTransport` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:98` | DELETE |
| 6 | `WebSocketSubscriptionTransport.Query` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:103` | DELETE |
| 7 | `WebSocketSubscriptionTransport.Subscribe` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:109` | DELETE |
| 8 | `normalizeWebSocketURL` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:232` | DELETE |
| 9 | `cloneHeader` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:243` | DELETE |
| 10 | `cloneDialer` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:254` | DELETE |
| 11 | `mustJSON` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:263` | DELETE |
| 12 | `Client.SubscribeChangeEvents` | `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go:275` | DELETE |

Companion deletions:

- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription.go` — removed entirely.
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription_test.go` — exercised only the deleted
  `WebSocketSubscriptionTransport` / `SubscribeChangeEvents` surface.
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/subscription_smoke_test.go` — likewise.
- `cli/internal/bead/axon/client_test.go` — drop the `ChangeEventFromLifecycle`
  / `ToLifecycleEvent` lifecycle-assertion block; the surrounding `Client`
  schema-binding assertions are kept.

No `// wiring:pending` annotations were added; nothing is being deferred.
